name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Load of Advapi31
notes:
This Building Block detects the load of advapi31.dll by a process running in an uncommon folder.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Load of Advapi31.dll
SIGMA Description: Detects the load of advapi32.dll by a process running in an uncommon folder

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Load of Advapi31 on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of advapi32.dll

when the event matches ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\ProgramData_Microsoft\Windows Defender\platform\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\MpCmdRun.exe') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Users\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData_Local\Microsoft_OneDrive\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%FileCoAuth.exe')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Load of Advapi31 on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of advapi32.dll

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\ProgramData_Microsoft\Windows Defender\platform\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\MpCmdRun.exe') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Users\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData_Local\Microsoft_OneDrive\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%FileCoAuth.exe')) AQL filter query
